revision.text:
<noinclude>;This page is utilized as a sub-template :which is called and is common to the usage sections of the merge templates it lists. 
:It does nothing more than list these links and self-categorize itself.</noinclude>{{#if:{{{noheading|}}}||
==See also==
{{further|Wikipedia:Splitting|Wikipedia:Merging}}
}}
===Merging===
{{div col|colwidth=25em}}
* {{tl|Merge}}
* {{tl|Merge to}}
* {{tl|Merging}}
* {{tl|Merge from}}
* {{tl|Merging from}}
* {{tl|Being merged}}
* {{tl|Duplication}}
* {{tl|Merge cleanup}}
{{div col end|}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Documentation see also templates|Merging]]
[[Category:Wikipedia template administration]]
</noinclude>

<noinclude>;This page is utilized as a sub-template :which is called and is common to the usage sections of the merge templates it lists.

{{div col end|}}<noinclude>

</noinclude>

<noinclude>;This page is utilized as a sub-template :which is called and is common to the usage sections of the merge templates it lists. 
:It does nothing more than list these links and self-categorize itself.</noinclude>{{#if:{{{noheading|}}}||

{{div col end|}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Documentation see also templates|Merging]]
[[Category:Wikipedia template administration]]
[[Category:refreshing imported pages]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Template_index%2FMerging%2FList here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Template_index%2FMerging%2FList for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<noinclude>;This page is utilized as a sub-template :which is called and is common to the usage sections of the merge templates it lists. 
:It does nothing more than list these links and self-categorize itself.</noinclude>{{#if:{{{noheading|}}}||
==See also==
{{further|Wikipedia:Splitting|Wikipedia:Merging}}
}}

* {{tl|Merge from}}

* {{tl|Being merged}}
* {{tl|Duplication}}
* {{tl|Merge cleanup}}
{{div col end|}}<noinclude>

</noinclude>
